Savings breakdown

Downtime reduction

5-year projection

Cumulative savings Cumulative SAM4 cost
How we calculated this

Downtime reduction: of current unplanned downtime hours, based on industry benchmarks for predictive maintenance programmes (sources: ARC Advisory Group, McKinsey & Company industrial operations research). This represents the mid-range of documented outcomes.

Maintenance savings: reduction in total maintenance spend through shift from reactive to condition-based maintenance. Conservative estimate. Excludes energy savings and extended asset life.

SAM4 cost: per asset per year. Includes hardware, cloud platform, AI diagnostics, and analyst-reviewed findings. Volume discounts apply above 500 assets.

What this excludes: Energy efficiency gains (typically 2-5% for pump/fan optimization), insurance premium reductions, safety incident avoidance, and carbon footprint reduction. Actual ROI is likely higher than shown.

These are estimates based on industry averages. Your actual results will depend on asset condition, operating environment, and maintenance maturity. Request a custom assessment →

Get your full ROI report

Receive a detailed breakdown with your inputs, assumptions, and recommendations. Delivered to your inbox.
